diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class and type definitions from submodules
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that re-exports core classes and types for users
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports Hono from ./hono and types from ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client modules
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Type definitions for Env, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, RouterRoute, Input, Schema
+- Internal names noticed: Next, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, H, BlankEnv, Variables, Bindings
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive TypeScript type definitions for the core Hono framework
+- Copy-safe detail: Defines all handler types, interface specifications, and environment type utilities
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class construction with router configuration
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Public Hono class that extends HonoBase with default SmartRouter configuration
+- Copy-safe detail: Single file wrapper around HonoBase with configurable router initialization
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: Routing methods (get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use)
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Router, Context, compose, getPath, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, _basePath, #path, routes
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Base implementation containing routing logic, handler registration, and dispatch mechanics
+- Copy-safe detail: Core routing engine with middleware support, error handling, and request dispatch via router
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: c.req, c.status, c.header(), c.text(), c.json(), c.html(), c.redirect(), c.render(), c.set(), c.get()
+- Internal names noticed: Context, executionCtx, env, #rawRequest, #var, #status, #res, #layout, #renderer, #notFoundHandler, finalized, error
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request context object providing access to env, headers, body, response building, and response methods
+- Copy-safe detail: Wraps raw Request, provides typed response methods (text/json/html), header management, and variable storage
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: c.req.param(), c.req.query(), c.req.header(), c.req.json(), c.req.text(), c.req.arrayBuffer(), c.req.blob(), c.req.formData(), c.req.parseBody()
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, raw, path, bodyCache, #validatedData, #matchResult, routeIndex, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath, cloneRawRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request object providing parameter extraction, query parsing, header access, and body reading
+- Copy-safe detail: Wraps raw Request with helper methods for params, queries, headers, and cached body access
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol exported for property access
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Exports a unique symbol for accessing match results
+- Copy-safe detail: Single symbol export for internal property access pattern
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function for multipart and urlencoded forms
+- Internal names noticed: BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Parses request body from form-data and form-urlencoded content with nested object support
+- Copy-safe detail: Handles all array parameters and dot-notation nested objects in form parsing
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function chaining middleware functions
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch, index, middleware, onError, onNotFound
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Composes multiple middleware handlers into single sequential execution function
+- Copy-safe detail: Koa-style composition pattern with error and not-found handler support
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class for throwing HTTP-level errors
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, HTTPExceptionOptions, getResponse, ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Exception class for authentication failures and other HTTP-level errors with optional response
+- Copy-safe detail: Provides status code and body support with getResponse() method for extracting response
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc() function, parseResponse, DetailedError, type exports
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, BuildSearchParamsFn
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP Client module entry point with proxy-based API client creation
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports hc client factory and response parsing utilities
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc() proxy factory, ClientRequestImpl fetch method
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl, fetch, buildSearchParams, pathParams, rBody, cType, createProxy, proxyCallback
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Creates proxy-based HTTP client that chains method calls to build requests
+- Copy-safe detail: Proxy pattern allows fluent API calls like hc().api.users.$get() with parameter support
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client<T, P>, ClientResponse<T, U, F>, ClientRequestOptions
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequest, ClientResponse, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, CallbackOptions, hURL, HonoURL, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferEndpointType, ExpandAllMethod, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ./router, ./types, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions enabling typed HTTP client generation from Hono app schema
+- Copy-safe detail: Complex conditional types map Hono routes to client methods with inferred request/response types
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
+- Internal names noticed: ObjectType, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English syntax: Utility functions for URL and query string manipulation in client
+- Copy-safe detail: Path building, query serialization, protocol switching, deep merge for options
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, jsonRegex, fetchRP
+- Imports or neighbors: None external
+- Plain-English summary: Response parsing wrapper detecting JSON vs text and throwing detailed errors on failures
+- Copy-safe detail: Content-type sniffing wrapper over fetch with structured error output
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function, handle export
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ./handler, ../../types
+- Plain-English summary: Registers Hono app with service worker fetch event listener
+- Copy-safe detail: AddEventListener wrapper for service worker environments
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle factory function
+- Internal names noticed: Handler, FetchEvent, HandleOptions, evt, res, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../../types, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Creates fetch event handler that delegates to Hono app with fallback fetch
+- Copy-safe detail: App.fetch() delegation wrapping with 404 fallback to native fetch
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent, FetchEvent, clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, resultingClientId, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript types for Service Worker FetchEvent interface
+- Copy-safe detail: Minimal interface extending Event with fetch-specific properties
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
I need to first create the bench-artifacts directory since it may be missing.
